\tzpentry{ID3744}{Text Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3744 introduces Text Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\mathcal{H}_{\\text{total}} = \\mathcal{H}_{\\text{levitated}}^{\\otimes 153600} \\otimes \\mathcal{H}_{\\text{shell-interior}}^{\\otimes 153600} \\otimes \\mathcal{H}_{\\text{shell-exterior}}^{\\otimes 153600} \\otimes \\mathcal{H}_{\\text{fiber}}^{\\otimes 153600}$$
